name: Mono Editorial · Numbered List
description: Modern monochrome slide with a title, short intro, and a numbered list of items. Each item has a small number, bold label and muted description. Great for agendas, frameworks, step lists.

example.title: How we'll spend the next 30 minutes
example.intro: A quick walk-through of scope, approach and measurable outcomes.

items.label: Outcomes
items.body: KPIs we commit to and how we'll measure them.

items.label: Next steps
items.body: Decisions needed from the team this week.
